title: melandrium glandulosum
intro: Melandrium glandulosum, also known as Red Campion or Maiden's Breath, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Caryophyllaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Melandrium glandulosum include its ability to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Melandrium glandulosum are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are typically used to soothe sore throats, reduce inflammation, and promote relaxation.
